title: Colorful Nixies
body:
Colorful Nixies is an add-on resource-pack to the Create mod which colors the glass shell of the nixies to be the same color as the dyed nixie itself! This makes nixies look much more aesthetic in color-themed builds.

![Before and After installing this resource pack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Gy8bflzI/images/0d6377163c6f7f6853b4591ef4516b7b72d443a3.gif)

Requires the Create mod!
